title: A Confluence of Services
opening: Welcome to the Royal Mail. How may I be of assistance today?

t1.prompt: Welcome to the Royal Mail. How may I be of assistance today?
t1.promptTranslation: Welcome to the Royal Mail. How may I be of assistance today?

t2_parcel.prompt: Certainly. Are you looking to send this domestically or internationally, and do you require any specific services like tracking or express delivery?
t2_parcel.promptTranslation: Certainly. Are you looking to send this domestically or internationally, and do you require any specific services like tracking or express delivery?

t3_customs.prompt: Right, for international parcels, we'll need to complete a customs declaration form, of course. Have you already filled one out, or shall I provide you with one now?
t3_customs.promptTranslation: Right, for international parcels, we'll need to complete a customs declaration form, of course. Have you already filled one out, or shall I provide you with one now?

t4_customs_help.prompt: No worries at all. It's fairly straightforward – just itemise the contents and their value clearly. Anything else I can assist you with today, perhaps regarding insurance or delivery times?
t4_customs_help.promptTranslation: No worries at all. It's fairly straightforward – just itemise the contents and their value clearly. Anything else I can assist you with today, perhaps regarding insurance or delivery times?

t2_stamps.prompt: Of course. Are you looking for first or second class, or perhaps some international stamps? And how many would you like?
t2_stamps.promptTranslation: Of course. Are you looking for first or second class, or perhaps some international stamps? And how many would you like?

t4_final_check.prompt: Right then, we'll get that processed for you. Anything else for you today, or are you all set?
t4_final_check.promptTranslation: Right then, we'll get that processed for you. Anything else for you today, or are you all set?

t-repeat.prompt: I'm terribly sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you possibly rephrase or speak a little more clearly, please?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I'm terribly sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you possibly rephrase or speak a little more clearly, please?

t-end.prompt: Right then, lovely. Thanks for popping in, and have a splendid day!
t-end.promptTranslation: Right then, lovely. Thanks for popping in, and have a splendid day!
